desc: Command: Places a Soil Vent Pipe (SVP) at a user-selected location.
summary: Command: Places a Soil Vent Pipe (SVP) at a user-selected location. Uses PlaceSVP for core placement logic. Uses MEPBridge.Revit.SheetSetup.Utilities.ListLevels for level fallback. Uses DrawPipe for pipe geometry creation. WORKFLOW: 1. Lists available piping systems via PlaceSVP.GetAvailableSystems 2. Gets current level from active view 3. Matches and sets drainage system type (Soil/SVP) 4. Prompts user to select placement location 5. Draws 3m vertical pipe upward from selected point 6. Draws 300mm extension downward from selected point
usecase: User needs to place a soil vent pipe stack at a specific location. User wants to quickly add an SVP to a bathroom or WC location. User is laying out drainage system with vertical stacks.
notfor: Not for autonomous AI execution. This command requires interactive Revit UI input (dialogs, picks, or manual confirmation).
precondition: Active document must be open. At least one piping system type must exist. User must be in a plan view to select the placement location. A level must exist in the model (used for Z elevation).
postcondition: Two connected vertical pipes are created at the selected location: - Main SVP: 3000mm upward from level elevation - Extension: 300mm downward from level elevation Pipes use the drainage/soil piping system type.
sideeffects: Creates pipe elements in the model that persist after command completion.
logictree: check: document.isOpen → continuecheck: pipingSystemTypes.any → continue, else → error "No piping systems"check: activeView.isPlan → getLevel, else → promptForLevelaction: findDrainageSystem → setSoilDrainageActiveaction: promptUserForLocation → getXYPointaction: createUpwardPipe(3000mm) → addToModelaction: createDownwardExtension(300mm) → addToModelresolve: success → showSuccess, else → showError

selection_inputs.name: InsertionPoint
selection_inputs.prompt: Select a point to place the SVP

config_inputs.name: UpwardLength
config_inputs.description: Height of main SVP in mm

preprompts: Placing a Soil Vent Pipe at your selected location...
Preparing to place your drainage stack...
thinkingsteps: Detecting current level from active view...
successprompts: Done! Drainage stack is ready at the selected location.
SVP created — 3m up, 300mm down from level.
